references.text: Backer, CA. 1951. Flagellariaceae. Flora Malesiana series 1, 4: 245-246

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 14 July 2025

species.citation: Becc. , Nelle Foreste di Borneo (1902) 198 ; Merrill, EPFP 1 (1923) 190; Backer, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 4 (1951) 245; ≡ Joinvillea borneensis ssp. borneensis (Becc.) Newell , J. Arnold Arbor. 50 (1969) 549.
species.distribution: Borneo, Malay Peninsula, Philippines, Sumatra. CAMIGUIN (photos), JOLO, MINDANAO: Zamboanga del Norte (photos), PALAWAN, SIBUYAN.
species.notes: Disturbed forest and forest edge, also on ridges. 620-2800m.
